ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sensor data collection */,
  "accel_x" REAL /* X-axis acceleration value */,
  "accel_y" REAL /* Y-axis acceleration value */,
  "accel_z" REAL /* Z-axis acceleration value */,
  "gyro_x" REAL /* X-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gyro_y" REAL /* Y-axis gyroscope value */,
  "gyro_z" REAL /* Z-axis gyroscope value */,
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sensor used */,
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of activity being performed */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the subject (e.g., patient, user) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the data point */,
  "recording_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the recording session */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the subject */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Body temperature of the subject */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the subject */,
  "battery_level" INTEGER /* Battery level of the sensor */,
  "signal_strength" REAL /* Signal strength of the sensor */,
  "environmental_data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to environmental data ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_activity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type_id") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_types ("sensor_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_types" (
  "sensor_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor type */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor type (e.g., Respeck) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor type */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the sensor manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery used in the sensor */,
  "data_rate" INTEGER /* Data rate at which the sensor collects data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., Walking, Sitting) */,
  "activity_code" INTEGER /* Code assigned to the activity type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the activity */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Full name of the subject */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the subject */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the subject */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the subject */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the subject */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the subject */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the subject */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies */,
  "family_history" TEXT /* Family medical history */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Insurance policy number */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recordings" (
  "recording_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each recording session */,
  "subject_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the subject (e.g., patient, user) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the recording session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the recording session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the recording took place */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the recording session */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the environmental conditions during the recording */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the recording */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device used for recording */,
  "recording_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the recording */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recordings_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare provider, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the user works */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "recording_id" TEXT /* ID of the recording being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_recording_id FOREIGN KEY ("recording_id") REFERENCES recordings ("recording_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
